channel.title: Madan Kumar PC — Cambridge Programme Coordinator & Educational Consultant
channel.description: Cambridge Programme Coordinator, CAP Accredited Career Counsellor, and EdTech advocate with 15+ years across education and IT. Based in Tamil Nadu, India.

item.title: About — Madan Kumar PC
item.description: Cambridge Programme Coordinator, CAP Accredited Career Counsellor, and EdTech advocate with 15+ years in education and IT. Coordinator at The Indian Public School (Erode, Salem, Trichy). 10+ years in Education, 5 years in IT. 30+ certifications. Tamil Nadu, India.

item.title: Work Experience — Madan Kumar PC
item.description: 15+ year career spanning The Indian Public School (Cambridge Implementation Coordinator HQ, Head of Career Guidance, Exam Officer, CS Facilitator), Ernst & Young Global Consulting (Senior Consultant Team Lead, IAM), Infosys BPM (Senior Systems Engineer), and Infosys (System Engineer, Internship Trainee).

item.title: Academic Education — Madan Kumar PC
item.description: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) from Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham (2007–2010) and Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) in E-Commerce from PSG College of Arts and Science (2004–2007). Continuous learning includes ICCC certification and CAP Accreditation.

item.title: Skills — Madan Kumar PC
item.description: Multi-domain skill set across Education & Pedagogy (Cambridge Curriculum, Assessment, Exam Administration), Career Guidance (CAP Counselling, Student Placement), EdTech & AI (AI for Educators, Adaptive Assessment), Information Technology (Java, IAM, SQL), Leadership & Management, and Languages (Tamil, English, Malayalam).

item.title: Achievements & Awards — Madan Kumar PC
item.description: Key career milestones: Cambridge Certified Exam Officer (2018), Head of Career Guidance & Placement Support (2020), Cambridge Implementation Coordinator HQ (2024), Member TIPS Learning & Research Institute (2024), CAP Accredited Counsellor (Ongoing), Contributor to Cambridge Collaborative Action Groups (Ongoing).

item.title: Professional Certifications — Madan Kumar PC
item.description: 30+ professional certifications across: Career Guidance (ICCC Foundation, CAP/Times Higher Education, Next Genius Foundation); International Schools Partnership (7 certifications, 2025); Cambridge University Press & Assessment (4 certifications); AI & EdTech (Common Sense Media, Microsoft, Scrollwell, GrowthSchool); Education & Pedagogy; Data & Technology; Personal Development; Office & Operations.

item.title: Recommendations — Madan Kumar PC
item.description: LinkedIn recommendations from colleagues, academic leaders, and fellow educators who have worked with Madan Kumar PC across education and IT careers.

item.title: Work Projects — Madan Kumar PC
item.description: Portfolio of projects: Personal Portfolio Website (HTML5/CSS3/JS/GitHub Pages); Dhuruv 4.0 personal management system (React/TypeScript/SQLite); Markdown Viewer Mark (Python/PyQt6); Invoice Tracker (React/TypeScript); Cambridge Syllabus Management Toolkit (Python); Pragat Evidence Portfolio (Electron/React/TypeScript).

item.title: Contact — Madan Kumar PC
item.description: Contact Madan Kumar PC for Cambridge programme consultation, career guidance, EdTech partnerships, or teacher training. Email: pcmadankumar@gmail.com. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/madankumarpc. Location: Tamil Nadu, India.
